title: So what is Rei up to in episode 24
display_title: So what is Rei up to in episode 24
wikitext:
[]: So what is Rei up to in episode 24?             Quote Post by Jobhug » Sat Dec 23, 2006 8:19 pm When Shinji is fighting Unit 02, a massive AT Field is detected and Rei is there. So Did Rei make it? Why didn't It fry Shinji when he fell on her in Rei, Beyond her Heart? Can she create it and colapse it wheneve she pleases? Or were they detecting Lilliths? Also why is she down there? Does she want to see Kaworu again? Did she want to meet Lilith? Was she helping Shinji by neutrelizing 02's AT field? To quote Kaworu in the same episode: "I do not understand." Any ideas?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Dec 23, 2006 8:25 pm Seems to me she was the one who flattened Kaworu's ATF, so as to keep h(er)im from rendering her true purpose moot. I wouldn't be surprised if she didn't exactly like Kaworu's relationship with Ikari-kun, either.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 23, 2006 10:11 pm Rei = Vessel + the soul of Lilith Kaworu = Vessel + the soul of Adam If you haven't yet, go watch The End of Evangelion. Otherwise you're going to have it ruined for you eventually.

[]:             Quote Post by Jobhug » Sat Dec 23, 2006 11:49 pm I've seen EoE, but for some reason I still don't understand how if Rei was capable of throwing up such a powerful AT field, why no one ever noticed, why she never utilized it in the various scenarios in which a Super AT field would have come in handy, and why she felt the need to expand her field right then.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Dec 23, 2006 11:52 pm Jobhug wrote: I've seen EoE, but for some reason I still don't understand how if Rei was capable of throwing up such a powerful AT field, why no one ever noticed, why she never utilized it in the various scenarios in which a Super AT field would have come in handy, and why she felt the need to expand her field right then.

[]:             Quote Post by Jobhug » Sat Dec 23, 2006 11:55 pm Sounds plausible

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Sun Dec 24, 2006 12:15 am Rei was pretty much doing the same thing in that episode that she did throughout the entire series. Namely 'nothing in particular'.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 24, 2006 3:40 am Ornette wrote: She didn't realize what she was until after Kaworu pointed it out to her.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Dec 24, 2006 3:52 am Mr. Tines wrote: Ornette wrote: She didn't realize what she was until after Kaworu pointed it out to her.

[]:             Quote Post by sir_evangelist » Sun Dec 24, 2006 9:52 am Maybe she created that At Field to protect gendoÂ´s plans. Kaworu was putting the hole thing under risk, he could blew it all.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 24, 2006 6:20 pm Gonna sound weird, but in some ways, I thought Rei III was LESS colder than Rei II, ie she seemed really concerned when "Ikari-kun" needed her help (just before betraying Gendou) and there was something about her where she really seemed to want him to make the right decision with rejecting Instrumenality, espeically in the LCL Sea scene. Just my thoughts though. In terms of what Rei the third was doing, I'd say she was just trying to stop Kaworu from making contact with "Adam". I wouldn't be surprised if she didn't exactly like Kaworu's relationship with Ikari-kun, either.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Dec 28, 2006 2:13 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: I wouldn't be surprised if she didn't exactly like Kaworu's relationship with Ikari-kun, either.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 28, 2006 2:54 am I guess I'm lost by what you mean in terms of realtionship, anyway. ^^; Do you mean about Kaworu just taking an interest in Shinji and they're becoming best buds so quickly or how some fans think they like each other romantically? (My main problem with that pov is you don't have to be in love with someone to love them, you know.) And yeah, I'm not blind, I do see your avatar, I'm simply asking because you once said something about how you feel Kaworu's love for Shinji supresses gender, time, spieces, etc (which I agree with; I just don't see it as a romantic love. Or at least, I guess it could be romantic on Kaworu-kun's part, I just don't see that from Shinji's pov.) but I don't know what type of love you meant by that. If I'm repeating myself in this post, sorry, it's late right now but I feel like I can't sleep.
